description: Mutable default arguments (e.g. def f(x=[])) are banned project-wide. Established in PR #1 when Arjun Mehta used `def process(data=[])`. Use None and initialize inside the function body instead.

Arjun Mehta has a recurring pattern of omitting try/except blocks around await calls in async route handlers. Flagged in PR #2 by Priya Nair, acknowledged but not resolved. Escalated in PR #4: 'This is the second time — please add this to your checklist.' This is a high-priority recurring issue.

All database calls must go through the repository layer. Direct ORM queries (e.g. db.query(Model).filter(...)) are not permitted in route handler files. Established in PR #3 during Danielle Osei's authentication module work.

The legacy auth module (auth/legacy.py) is approved to use direct ORM queries until the Q3 authentication refactor is complete. Exception granted in PR #3. All other modules must use the repository layer.
